#### Customer Support

[Contact Us](https://www.t-mobile.com/contact-us)

From your T-Mobile phone: 611

Call: [1-800-937-8997](tel:18009378997)

You will be charged a monthly Regulatory Programs ('RPF') & Telco Recovery Fee ('TRF') (not a government required tax or charge) totaling $4.49 for Voice Lines and $2.10 for Mobile Internet lines ('MI') (subject to change without notice; plus tax). Of the $4.49 total charge for voice lines, $0.50 is applied to the RPF and $3.99 is applied to the TRF. For MI lines $0.12 is applied to the RPF and $1.98 is applied to the TRF. These fees help recover costs T-Mobile incurs to provide service and may not apply to certain data devices/services.

### Got Questions?

- ### What is T-Mobile 5G Home Internet?











  - It’s affordable internet service with national availability that lets you do it all with no annual contract, and no equipment fees.

  - T-Mobile Internet service is powered by America’s largest 5G network in locations we determine will receive a great internet experience.

  - You receive service through a 5G Gateway device (which combines the capabilities of a router and a modem), the Gateway device then converts the 5G signal to Wi-Fi, and provides a Wi-Fi signal.

  - The [T-Mobile Rely Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans), [T-Mobile Amplified Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans), [T-Mobile All-In Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans/5g-home-internet-plus) and [AWAY™](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans/rv-camper-internet-plans) plans have our 5-year price guarantee so you won’t have to worry about exploding bills and price hikes (exclusions like taxes and fees apply).

  - Go from box to browsing in 15 minutes or less with an easy, self-installation process.


- ### How fast is 5G home internet (in Mbps) compared to cable?











T-Mobile Rely Home Internet customers receive typical speeds between **133 – 415 Mbps (5G)**. Typical upload speeds are between 12 – 55 Mbps (5G). 25% of our customers see speeds below and 25% see speeds above these ranges.



[T-Mobile All-In or Amplified Home Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans) customers receive typical speeds between 170 mbps – 498 mbps. Typical upload speeds are between 12 – 55 Mbps. 25% of our customers see speeds below and 25% see speeds above these ranges.



Keep in mind that speeds can vary depending on location, time of day, signal strength and availability, and other factors. Click [here](https://www.t-mobile.com/responsibility/consumer-info/policies/internet-service) for more info.



While we can’t directly compare speeds for T-Mobile 5G Home Internet at your address vs. Xfinity, Spectrum, Comcast, Cox, etc., you can check your current speeds [here](https://www.speedtest.net/) and see for yourself. Best of all, you have nothing to lose, since you can  [try out](https://www.t-mobile.com/support/home-internet/15-day-test-drive)T-Mobile Home Internet first to make sure you find a plan that works for you.

- ### Do these plans come with 5-Year price guarantee?











Yes, new and upgrading customers on the [T-Mobile Rely Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans), [T-Mobile Amplified Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans), [T-Mobile All-In Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans/5g-home-internet-plus) and [AWAY™](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans/rv-camper-internet-plans) plans are covered by our 5- year price guarantee. 5-year price guarantee means that we won't change the price of fixed-wireless 5G internet data for at least 5 years while you are on an eligible plan. Taxes & fees, voluntary equipment or speed upgrades, future wireless generations, select limited-time promotions, per-use charges, third-party services, and network management practices aren't included. This guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn't restart if you add a line or change plans after that.

- ### What is the T-Mobile Rely Internet Plan?











Rely Home Internet provides all the essentials for reliable 5G internet at a low monthly rate of $35/month with AutoPay and any T-Mobile voice line (plus taxes and fees). It includes unlimited data, a high-performance gateway and T-Mobile’s 5-year price guarantee, so your rate for 5G internet data won’t increase for at least 5 years from your initial activation (exclusions like taxes and fees apply). Rely delivers reliable Wi-Fi with speeds that keep your household streaming, working, and playing.

- ### What is the T-Mobile Amplified Internet Plan?











T-Mobile Amplified Internet gives households everything included with the Rely plan – unlimited data and a 5-year price guarantee (exclusions like taxes and fees apply) – plus T-Mobile’s latest high performance premium Wi-Fi 7 gateway, and typical download speeds of 170 – 498 Mbps for faster speeds that seamlessly support more people and devices. 25% of our customers see speeds below and 25% see speeds above this range.

- ### What is the T-Mobile All-In Internet Plan?











This plan is ideal for those looking for the most value packed option for their household. It includes unlimited data, T-Mobile’s 5-year price guarantee (exclusions like taxes and fees apply) and over $480/year in added value.



Customers who activate new Home Internet service on the All-In plan, on or after November 13, 2025 also get our TechEdge Suite, which includes these technology benefits:



  - A mesh Wi-Fi extender to expand your Wi-Fi coverage, delivering seamless connectivity to more places throughout your home.
  - Advanced Cyber Security to keep your devices digitally secure and protected.
  - 24/7 Interactive Live Assistance with Video Support from Assurant Personal TechPro for any Wi-Fi connected smart devices in the home– helping people stay free from tech stress with setup, troubleshooting and maintenance support.
  - Gateway Upgrade to the latest generation gateway after year 3. (Available to customers who activate new Home Internet service on the All-In plan, on or after November 13, 2025)

This plan also includes additional streaming benefits, which allow you to stream your favorite series, hit movies and live sports:

  - Hulu on Us to stream full seasons of exclusive series, plus current episodes, Hulu Originals, hit movies, and more.
  - Paramount+ on Us to stream over 40,000 episodes and movies, exclusive originals, live sports & more!

- ### What is the difference between T-Mobile Home Internet and T-Mobile Fiber?











T-Mobile 5G Home Internet is our fixed wireless internet service, which runs on our 5G network and is available to 70 million households across the country. [T-Mobile Fiber](https://fiber.t-mobile.com/) delivers home internet over fiber-optic lines and is currently available in select locations across the U.S.

- ### Can I choose between T-Mobile Home Internet and T-Mobile Fiber? Can I switch between the two?











Yes! Customers eligible for both T-Mobile Home Internet and T-Mobile Fiber can choose the home broadband option that best suits their needs. T-Mobile 5G Home Internet and T-Mobile Fiber have no annual contracts, so you can switch at any time.

- ### When will T‑Mobile Fiber internet be available in my area?











Our service is currently available in select cities and regions in the United States. You can [check your eligibility](https://fiber.t-mobile.com/) to find out if T-Mobile Fiber is available at your address. We're working to expand our service to more locations. [Join our waitlist](https://t-mobilefiber.com/waitlist) and we’ll reach out as soon as we're available at your address. You can also check to see if you are eligible for our 5G Home Internet service at [https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet.](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet)

- ### I’m a T-Mobile Puerto Rico customer with the T-Mobile All-In Home Internet Plan? Do I qualify for Paramount+ ON US?











No, Paramount+ is not available in Puerto Rico.

## No exploding bills

### Got Questions?

- ### What is T-Mobile Fiber internet?











We have plans offering speeds from 300 Mbps up to 2 Gigs (2000 Mbps) in select locations throughout the United States (speeds vary by location). Our service offers the same upload and download speeds for consistently fast speeds in both directions.



With fiber internet you also get significantly more uploading power than with most cable internet options. Upload speeds are critical for households with multiple people and devices using the internet simultaneously for a wide range of tasks, including:



  - Video conferencing
  - Gaming
  - Sharing large files
  - Livestreaming.

- ### Which internet technology is best for me??











It really depends on your needs - both Fiber and 5G offer fast, reliable internet with unique advantages. Fiber offers the power to take your internet experience to the gigabit level, unlocking ultra high performance for households of avid gamers, remote workers or families who just want the best of streaming and reliability. On the other hand, 5G is perfect for those who value flexibility and ease of installation.

- ### What is T-Mobile 5G Home Internet?











  - It’s affordable internet service with national availability that lets you do it all with taxes and fees included for qualified accounts, no annual contract, and no equipment fees.
  - T-Mobile Internet service is powered by America’s largest 5G network in locations we determine will receive a great internet experience.
  - You receive service through a 5G Gateway device (which combines the capabilities of a router and a modem), the Gateway device then converts the 5G signal to Wi-Fi, and provides a Wi-Fi signal.
  - All of our plans are price locked so you won’t have to worry about exploding bills and price hikes.
  - Go from box to browsing in 15 minutes or less with an easy, self-installation process.

- ### How does installation work?











T-Mobile Fiber internet installation involves running a fiber-optic cable from the nearest fiber connection point (like a street node) to your home. Technicians will either bury the cable underground or attach it to utility poles. Once the cable reaches your home, they install an Optical Network Terminal (ONT) inside, which converts the fiber signal into one that your devices can use. Then, the ONT is connected to a router, which distributes the internet to your home via Wi-Fi or wired connections. The technician will test the connection to ensure everything works, and once activated, you're ready to enjoy fast, reliable fiber internet.



T-Mobile 5G internet installation is much simpler than fiber internet installation. Here's how it generally works:



1. Set Up the Gateway: Once you receive the device, you’ll plug it into a power outlet and connect it to your home’s Wi-Fi network. The gateway needs to be placed near a window or in a location with a good 5G signal for the best performance.
2. Activation: After plugging it in, you’ll follow the setup instructions, either on a mobile app or through a web interface, to activate the service. This process typically takes just a few minutes.
3. Start Using the Service: Once activated, the 5G Home Internet Gateway provides high-speed 5G internet to your home, either via Wi-Fi or Ethernet, depending on your setup.

No need for technicians to come to your house for installation—it's a self-installation process, making it quick and easy to get started with 5G internet.

- ### What is the difference between Fiber and Cable internet?











Fiber offers faster speeds, higher reliability, and greater bandwidth than cable, which uses electrical signals over coaxial cables. Fiber is less prone to interference and can deliver speeds up to 25x faster, especially for uploads. Cable, however, can experience slower speeds during peak usage times due to network congestion.

- ### Will I be charged for installation?











Nope! T-Mobile Fiber Installation is included in the cost of your plan. T-Mobile 5G Internet just requires a simple 15‑minute self‑install.

- ### WIll T-Mobile help pay my early termination fee if I switch?











T-Mobile 5G home internet



We’ve made it easier than ever for customers stuck in a contract or bundle to make the switch to T-Mobile Internet! When new and existing customers make the move to T-Mobile Internet from an Internet Service Provider (ISP), we'll pay off your previous carrier’s service contracts and early termination fee (ETF) up to $500. There has never been a better time to break up with your ISP!







T-Mobile Fiber Internet



We’ll cover your early termination fee—up to $750 via virtual prepaid card to you—when you switch to T-Mobile Fiber. Submit your claim to RCSolutions@T-MobileSupport.com.

- ### How fast is 5G home internet (in Mbps) compared to cable?











[T-Mobile All-In or Amplified Home Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans) customers delivering typical speeds between 134 mbps – 415 mbps. Typical upload speeds are between 12 – 55 Mbps. 25% of our customers see speeds below and 25% see speeds above these ranges.



Keep in mind that speeds can vary depending on location, time of day, signal strength and availability, and other factors. Click [here](https://www.t-mobile.com/responsibility/consumer-info/policies/internet-service) for more info.



While we can’t directly compare speeds for T-Mobile 5G Home Internet vs. Xfinity, Spectrum, Comcast, Cox, etc., you can check your current speeds [here](https://www.speedtest.net/) and see for yourself. Best of all, you have nothing to lose, since you can [try out](https://www.t-mobile.com/support/home-internet/15-day-test-drive)T-Mobile Home Internet first to make sure you find a plan that works for you.

4. If you don’t have a TMO ID, [click here](https://insider.t-mobile.com/faq "https://insider.t-mobile.com/faq") to find your billing phone number.

1. [Click here](https://insider.t-mobile.com/faq "https://insider.t-mobile.com/faq") for help finding your 10-digit billing phone number.
7. Fill out the promotion registration form using your 10-digit billing phone number and promo code: **240168**.
8. Eligible customers will receive the Virtual Prepaid Mastercard in 10 weeks.

**What is T-Mobile Fiber Internet?**

**Blazing-fast fiber speeds**

Get ready for next-level speed. With up to 2GB of pure fiber, you’ll experience lightning-fast upload and download speeds, smooth streaming, and ultra-responsive gaming. No buffering, no delays.

**Ultra-reliable, drama-free internet**

Think of fiber as your most dependable friend—always there, 24/7, rain or shine. Whether it’s work, streaming, or gaming, you can count on a strong, stable connection that never ghosts you.

**Built for gamers**

Play without limits. Our fiber internet delivers low latency and high bandwidth for seamless, lag-free gaming. No delays, no buffering—just straight-up epic wins.

**No installation or equipment fees**

Say goodbye to setup costs. With T-Mobile Fiber, there are no hidden fees or surprise charges—just simple, reliable internet.

## T-Mobile 5G Home Internet

Get the full 5G unlimited home internet experience at a great value.

**Advanced & unlimited internet coverage**

- Includes high-performance premium 5G Gateway with our fastest speeds.

- Wi-Fi Mesh Access Point provides expanded coverage, a smoother experience, and increased speed in more places throughout the home.


Delivered via 5G cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks, including data prioritization.​​

**Worry-free tech support**

- 24/7 interactive live assistance with video support allows you to show a virtual expert what you need help with, whether it’s setting up a smart thermostat or troubleshooting your computer.

- Utilize optional screen and camera sharing support while chatting with a real person.


​​Third party terms apply.​

**Built-in security**

**Advanced Cyber Security** protection proactively monitors and helps block threats on your home network and connected devices.

**Streaming perks**

- Get Hulu (With Ads) ON US for Internet. Stream full seasons of exclusive series, plus current episodes, Hulu Originals, hit movies, and more.

- Paramount+ Essential Plan for Internet ON US lets you stream over 40,000 episodes and hit movies, plus exclusive originals, live sports, and more.


## T-Mobile Fiber

There’s a lot to love about T‑Mobile Fiber, and we’re making it easy for you to switch.

Supercharge your bandwidth on a 100% fiber-optic network.

Fiber-optic lines send data via light signals, giving your home internet warp-speed capabilities. This means you—and others in your home—can really put your devices to work, all at once.

Put your Wi-Fi in hyperdrive with a powerful Wi-Fi 6 router.

For no added cost, we’ll hook you up with one of the fastest Wi-Fi routers on the market with coverage of up to 2,000 square feet.

Enjoy simple, competitive pricing.

Our internet plans are straightforward with no BS. With T‑Mobile Fiber there are no annual contracts or additional costs for equipment or installation. Just stellar service.

Feel confident with home internet you can trust.

Our ultra-low latency and 24/7 network monitoring significantly reduce bouts with lag, meaning you get smooth video connections and lightning-fast file transfers.

This is the easiest switch you’ll ever make.

We have all the speed you need for TV streaming.Our gigabit internet supports dozens of devices at once. That means you can drop cable TV and use your favorite [streaming service](https://fiber.t-mobile.com/fiber-internet-service/tv-streaming-service-deals) instead, and save money in the process.

We don’t ask you to commit.

We don’t lock you into a long-term contract. We believe in our service and that you’ll love being a T‑Mobile Fiber customer. But you can cancel service at any time.

Get installed in a flash.

Just set up an appointment to activate your service and we’ll quickly have you up and running—with no additional charges for installation or equipment.

## T-Mobile Home Internet Backup

Not your main squeeze, but we show up when it counts.

Home Internet Backup is our simple way to keep your whole home connected—automatically switching to T-Mobile's network when your primary internet goes down.

Delivered via T-Mobile's 5G and 4G LTE cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks.

**Our Backup plan features:**

- Simple setup in 15 minutes or less.
- 100 hours of data per billing cycle.
- Three Backup Passes per year, each adding an extra 100 hours of data at no additional cost.
- No annual contracts or equipment fees.

Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.

## T-Mobile AWAY™

Introducing AWAY™ A new Wi-Fi solution for life on the go.

AWAY™ is our beyond-the-home internet plan that gives you the freedom to stream, work, and play where adventure leads you—all on America’s largest 5G network.

Delivered via T-Mobile’s 5G and 4G LTE cellular network; speeds vary due to factors affecting cellular networks.

**Our AWAY™ plan features:**

- Simple setup in 15 minutes or less.​

- The ability for passengers to stay connected in motion.

- The capability to connect up to 64 devices at a time.

- Pause up to 90 days, twice a year, for $10 a month.

- Our 5G Wi-Fi Gateway is included at no additional cost, and there are zero monthly equipment fees.

- A great price, guaranteed for 5 years.


​​Exclusions like taxes & fees apply.​

## How to redeem your $200 Virtual Prepaid Mastercard®

## Save these steps to redeem your $200 Virtual Prepaid Mastercard®

1. [Check availability](https://www.t-mobile.com/isp/eligibility "https://www.t-mobile.com/isp/eligibility") and sign up for unlimited T-Mobile Home Internet online or via chat.
2. If available, sign up for a [T-Mobile ID](https://www.t-mobile.com/support/account/set-up-and-manage-your-t-mobile-id "https://www.t-mobile.com/support/account/set-up-and-manage-your-t-mobile-id")
3. If you’re already a T-Mobile voice customer, you may already have a TMO ID.
4. If you don’t have a TMO ID, [click here](https://insider.t-mobile.com/faq "https://insider.t-mobile.com/faq") to find your billing phone number.

[Partners](https://gizmodo.com/partners)

# T-Mobile 5G Home Internet Delivers Fast Speeds, Low Monthly Prices and Up to $300 Back

Lower monthly prices and money-back offers are available for new subscribers to T-Mobile's three great 5G plans.


Sponsored by T-Mobile


Published March 27, 2026, 6:55 am ET


Reading time 3 minutes


![T Mo Home Internet](https://gizmodo.com/app/uploads/2026/03/T-Mo-Home-Internet.jpg)

© T-Mobile 5G Home Internet


Read LaterRead Later

Lots of home internet providers come at you with different ways they claim can save you money. But how many are offering two completely different forms of super-fast broadband to ensure you get the best fit for your needs and where you live? That’s what T-Mobile has on the table for new customers — the choice between high-speed 5G Home Internet and 2-Gig Fiber, with great deals available for whichever one you choose.

T-Mobile’s 5G Home Internet is the fastest 5G Home Internet available, according to Ookla® Speedtest®\*, the gold-standard measure of internet speed. Right now [new customers who sign up for T-Mobile 5G Home Internet along with a voice line and AutoPay save up to $20 per month](https://shop.gizmodo.com/go/6999/), with a 5-year Price Guarantee (excluding taxes and fees) and no annual contracts. And depending on which of T-Mobile’s three 5G plans you choose — all of them come with unlimited data — you can get up to $300 back in the form of a virtual prepaid Mastercard.

Speeds vary due to local network characteristics and management. **Up to $300 Back:** Allow 17 weeks from rebate submission.

\*Source: Ookla® Speedtest Intelligence® data, 2H2025. All rights reserved.

[See at T-Mobile](https://shop.gizmodo.com/go/6999/)

## Three Fast Ways to Save

T-Mobile 5G Home Internet knows that home internet plans are not one-size-fits-all. The Rely plan is the entry point, with unlimited data and a low monthly rate of $30 per month for customers who also have a T-Mobile voice line and AutoPay; plus taxes and fees. The Amplified plan, just $40 per month with voice and AutoPay; plus taxes and fees, steps up with the company’s latest premium Wi-Fi 7 gateway.

The top-level All-In plan pushes further with bundled perks such as Hulu and Paramount+ Essential, and an automatic gateway upgrade after year 3. Signing up for a new All-In plan is also the way to max out your money-back deal during this promotion — $300 in the form of a prepaid virtual Mastercard. New Amplified customers get $200 back, and $100 goes to new subscribers to the Rely plan.

Performance is obviously the part people care about once the billing pitch is out of the way, and T-Mobile is leaning hard on that too. According to Ookla® Speedtest® T-Mobile 5G Home Internet has the fastest 5G Home Internet. The All-In and Amplified plans can hit speeds up to 498 Mbps, with upload speeds up to 55Mbps. That’s more than enough speed and capacity for remote workers and everyday users.

Speeds vary due to local network characteristics and management. **Up to $300 Back**: Allow 17 weeks from rebate submission. **Fastest**: Ookla Speedtest Intelligence® data, 2H 2025. All rights reserved.

## Choose Your Champion

In real-world terms, switching to T-Mobile 5G Home Internet is a fairly practical choice. A smaller household that mostly wants dependable streaming, browsing, and work-from-home coverage can start with Rely and not feel like it is paying for extras that never get used. A busier home with more devices, dead spots, and the usual smart-home clutter starts to look like a better fit for Amplified, where the upgraded gateway do a lot of the heavy lifting. And the All-In plan is clearly aimed at people who would rather overbuild their setup once than troubleshoot it forever, especially when streaming perks, tech support, and a future gateway upgrade are part of the package.

Meanwhile, T-Mobile Fiber 2 Gig remains the obvious fit for addresses that can get it and want the classic low-latency, symmetrical-speed experience. Head to T-Mobile now and enter your address to see if Fiber 2 Gig is available in your area.

New T-Mobile customers can get $20 off per month with AutoPay and a qualifying voice line during this promotion, with that discounted pricing guaranteed for five years on eligible 5G Home Internet plans (exclusions like taxes and fees apply). On top of that, new digital activations can qualify for up to $300 back via virtual prepaid Mastercard — $100 on Rely, $200 on Amplified, and $300 on All-In. And with T-Mobile 5G Home Internet it’s all up-front, not buried in fine print or cleverly handcuffed to a long term contract.

For anyone already thinking about replacing an aging cable plan, cutting down on the usual equipment-fee nonsense, or moving into a home where the internet setup needs to happen fast, T-Mobile’s latest 5G Home Internet deal lands at a useful moment. Signup and setup are both amazingly easy and fast, and T-Mobile 5G Home Internet is also ranked #1 in customer satisfaction for national home wireless internet service by J.D. Power, for the second year in a row. Fast, easy, and priced for everyone — [T-Mobile’s home internet options are waiting for you to switch.](https://shop.gizmodo.com/go/6999/)

Speeds vary due to local network characteristics and management. **Up to $300 Back**: Allow 17 weeks from rebate submission. **#1 Customer Satisfaction**: T-Mobile received the highest score nationally among wireless internet providers in the J.D. Power 2024-2025 U.S. Residential Internet Service Provider Satisfaction Studies, which measure customers’ satisfaction of service with their current internet provider. Visit jdpower.com/awards for more details.

**Here’s how to submit your T-Mobile Internet Contract Freedom Claim**

We'll reimburse your previous internet service provider's early termination fees when you join T-Mobile Home Internet or Small Business Internet—up to $750 via virtual prepaid card to you.

**Step 1:** Get a new device and a qualifying plan.

**Step 2:** Cancel your old internet service.

**Step 3:** Pay your old Internet Service Provider's (ISP's) final bill.

**Step 4:** Prepare your reimbursement request within 60 days of activation of your T-Mobile internet service. (Activation occurs either at time of purchase or when the gateway is shipped to you).

You'll need to submit a screen shot or photo of your final bill showing the early termination fee (ETF). The name or address on the bill must match your T‑Mobile Account billing information. See FAQs for details before you log in.

### Got Questions?

- ### What is T-Mobile 5G Home Internet?











  - It’s affordable internet service with national availability that lets you do it all with taxes and fees included for qualified accounts, no annual contract, and no equipment fees.
  - T-Mobile Internet service is powered by America’s largest 5G network in locations we determine will receive a great internet experience.
  - You receive service through a 5G Gateway device (which combines the capabilities of a router and a modem), the Gateway device then converts the 5G signal to Wi-Fi, and provides a Wi-Fi signal.
  - The [T-Mobile Rely Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans), [T-Mobile Amplified Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans), [T-Mobile All-In Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans/5g-home-internet-plus) and [AWAY™](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans/rv-camper-internet-plans) plans have our 5-year price guarantee so you won’t have to worry about exploding bills and price hikes (exclusions like taxes and fees apply).
  - Go from box to browsing in 15 minutes or less with an easy, self-installation process.

- ### How fast is 5G home internet (in Mbps) compared to cable?











[T-Mobile All-In or Amplified Home Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans) customers delivering typical speeds between 134 mbps – 415 mbps. Typical upload speeds are between 12 – 55 Mbps. 25% of our customers see speeds below and 25% see speeds above these ranges.



Keep in mind that speeds can vary depending on location, time of day, signal strength and availability, and other factors. Click [here](https://www.t-mobile.com/responsibility/consumer-info/policies/internet-service) for more info.



While we can’t directly compare speeds for T-Mobile 5G Home Internet vs. Xfinity, Spectrum, Comcast, Cox, etc., you can check your current speeds [here](https://www.speedtest.net/) and see for yourself. Best of all, you have nothing to lose, since you can [try out](https://www.t-mobile.com/support/home-internet/15-day-test-drive)T-Mobile Home Internet first to make sure you find a plan that works for you.

- ### Do these plans come with 5-Year price guarantee?











Yes, new and upgrading customers on the [T-Mobile Rely Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans), [T-Mobile Amplified Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans), [T-Mobile All-In Internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans/5g-home-internet-plus) and [AWAY™](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet/plans/rv-camper-internet-plans) plans are covered by our 5- year price guarantee. 5-year price guarantee means that we won't change the price of fixed-wireless 5G internet data for at least 5 years while you are on an eligible plan. Taxes & fees, voluntary equipment or speed upgrades, future wireless generations, select limited-time promotions, per-use charges, third-party services, and network management practices aren't included. This guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn't restart if you add a line or change plans after that.

- ### What is the T-Mobile Rely Internet Plan?











Rely Home Internet provides all the essentials for reliable 5G internet at a low monthly rate of $35/month with AutoPay and any T-Mobile voice line. Plus, with 5-year price guarantee we won’t raise your rate on internet for at least 5 years from your initial activation (exclusions like taxes and fees apply). It comes with unlimited data, a 5G gateway, and taxes & fees included for qualifying accounts. It delivers reliable Wi-Fi with speed that will keep you streaming, working, and playing.

- ### What is the T-Mobile Amplified Internet Plan?











With T-Mobile Amplified internet, households enjoy the benefits from the Rely plan, plus T-Mobile’s latest 5G gateway for faster speeds that seamlessly support more people and devices. This comes on top of additional benefits like Advanced Cyber Security for added digital peace of mind.



Beyond the standard security protections included for all 5G Internet users, with Advanced Cyber Security, customers get things like Safe Browsing to help block malicious links along with Anomaly Detection to help protect connected devices from cybercriminals — all of which is easily managed through the [T-Life app](https://www.t-mobile.com/apps).

- ### What is the T-Mobile All-In Internet Plan?











This plan is ideal for larger families or those with more devices looking to get the most out of their Home Internet. It includes nearly $300/year in value with benefits like:



  - Faster speeds and more powerful performance in more places with our latest 5G Gateway and a mesh unit to boost Wi-Fi performance in those hard-to-reach places.
  - Advanced Cyber Security to keep your devices digitally secure and protected.
  - 24/7 Interactive Live Assistance with Video Support from Assurant Personal TechPro for any Wi-Fi connected smart devices in the home– helping people stay free from tech stress with setup, troubleshooting and maintenance support.
  - Hulu on Us to stream full seasons of exclusive series, plus current episodes, Hulu Originals, hit movies, and more.
  - Paramount+ on Us to stream over 40,000 episodes and hit movies, plus exclusive originals, live sports & more with Paramount+!

- ### What is the difference between T-Mobile Home Internet and T-Mobile Fiber?











T-Mobile Home Internet is our fixed wireless internet service, which runs on our 4G LTE and 5G networks and is available to 70 million households across the country. T-Mobile Fiber delivers home internet over fiber-optic lines and is currently available in select locations across the U.S.

- ### Can I choose between T-Mobile Home Internet and T-Mobile Fiber? Can I switch between the two?











Yes! Customers eligible for both T-Mobile Home Internet and T-Mobile Fiber can choose the home broadband option that best suits their needs. T-Mobile 5G Home Internet and T-Mobile Fiber have no annual contracts, so you can switch at any time.

- ### When will T‑Mobile Fiber internet be available in my area?











Our service is currently available in select cities and regions in the United States. You can check your eligibility to find out if T-Mobile Fiber is available at your address. We're working to expand our service to more locations. [Join our waitlist](https://t-mobilefiber.com/waitlist) and we’ll reach out as soon as we're available at your address. You can also check to see if you are eligible for our 5G Home Internet service at [https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet](https://www.t-mobile.com/home-internet).

# Get in on our best 5G Home Internet deals.​

Savings, perks, all the good stuff—just waiting for you.

![Promotion for T-Mobile 5G Home Internet: Get a Month On Us plus up to $300 back.](https://t-mobile.scene7.com/is/image/Tmusprod/fg-hsi-month-on-us-GCBadge_9935801:16x9?fmt=png-alpha&qlt=100,0&resMode=sharp2&op_usm=1.75,0.3,2,0)

LIMITED TIME ONLY

## Get a Month On Us, plus up to $300 back.  Get a Month On Us, plus up to $300 back.

Save on fast home internet and make the switch to any T‑Mobile 5G Home Internet plan.

Check availability, opens in a new window

Use code MONTHONUS at checkout. Plus tax. Month via bill credit. Money back via virtual prepaid card; allow 14 weeks from rebate submission. Speeds vary due to local network characteristics and management. Get full terms

## Get a Month On Us, plus up to $300 back.

**Month On Us:** with one-time bill credit equal to monthly rate plus fees after AutoPay and other applicable discounts. Limited-time; subject to change. Qualifying new Internet line required. Enter promotional code at checkout. Not transferrable. Allow 2 bill cycles for credit. Limit 2/account. May not be combined with some offers or discounts. **Money Back:** Limited-time; subject to change. Register code within 30 days of activating qualifying new Internet line ( **$100**: Rely; **$200**: Amplified; **$300**: All-In). If you have cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Up to $300 via virtual prepaid Mastercard; use online or in-store via accepted mobile payment apps; **no cash access & expires in 6 months**. The Virtual Prepaid Mastercard is issued by Sunrise Banks N.A., Member FDIC, pursuant to a license from Mastercard International Incorporated. Mastercard is a registered trademark, and the circles design is a trademark of Mastercard International Incorporated. This card may be used everywhere Debit Mastercard is accepted. Registration, activation, acceptance, or use of this card constitutes acceptance of the terms and conditions stated in the Prepaid Card Agreement. This promotion is not associated, sponsored, or endorsed by Mastercard or Sunrise Banks N.A. Lines must be active and in good standing when card is issued. Max 1/account. May not be combined with some offers, discounts, or promotions.

![Wi-Fi 7 gateway and two phones are set together. ](https://t-mobile.scene7.com/is/image/Tmusprod/fg-SMRA-gateway-4phones-deals-9254537:16x9?fmt=png&fmt=png-alpha&qlt=100,0&resMode=sharp2&op_usm=1.75,0.3,2,0)

HOME INTERNET + VOICE PLAN

## Save your family up to $1000/yr when you bundle.  Save your family up to $1000/yr when you bundle.

New and existing customers can unlock bigger savings when bundling All-In **5G Home Internet with 4 lines on our Experience Beyond voice plan and Autopay.** You’ll get access to exclusive benefits, the latest phones on us, and Wi-Fi equipment included. **Plus, your price won’t change for 5 years.**

Excludes taxes and fees.

Check availability[Call 1-844-715-3561](tel:1-844-715-3561)

5 Year Price Guarantees the monthly price of on-network talk, text, & 5G data on our Experience plans and fixed-wireless 5G internet data on our All-In 5G Home Internet plan. Get full terms

## Save your family up to $1000/yr when you bundle.

**Full Terms**

**Savings:**

​Limited-time; subject to change. Savings based on 3rd line free via monthly bill credits, internet discount with $15 in monthly bill credits, and AutoPay discount. Qualifying credit required. Credits may take up to 2 bill cycles; **credits will stop if you cancel any lines or change plans.** AutoPay pricing requires bank acct. or debit card, otherwise $5 more/mo./line. May not be combined with any other discounts, promotions, or offers.

**5 Year Price Guarantee Experience Plans:**

5 year guarantee means we won’t change the price of talk, text, and 5G smartphone data on our network for at least 5 years as long as you are on an Experience plan. Guarantee also applies to price for data on wearable/tablet/mobile internet lines added to your plan. Your guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn’t restart if you add a line or change plans after that. Taxes & fees, per-use charges, plan add-ons, third-party services, and network management practices aren’t included.

**5 Year Price Guarantee All-In Internet Plan:**

5-year price guarantee means that we won't change the price of fixed-wireless 5G internet data for at least 5 years while you are on an eligible plan. Taxes & fees, voluntary equipment or speed upgrades, future wireless generations, select limited-time promotions, per-use charges, third-party services, and network management practices aren't included. This guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn't restart if you add a line or change plans after that.

**Experience Beyond Plan:**

Limited time; subject to change. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $4.49 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Credit approval & deposit may be required. U.S. roaming and on-network data allotments differ: includes 200MB roaming. Unlimited talk & text features for direct communications between 2 people; others (e.g., conference & chat lines, etc.) may cost extra. Unlimited high-speed data in US only. Not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Capable device required for some features. Activation required to deliver video streams at speeds that provide up to Ultra HD video capability (max 4K); some content providers may not stream their services in UHD. May affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. **Upgrade-ready Every Year:** Available only for qualifying new financed devices purchased on Experience Beyond plan; existing devices are not eligible. Upgrade qualifying device after at least 6 months and when 50% of device cost has been paid. Trade-in device must be in good working order. You must be current with your scheduled financing and wireless service payments. Upgrading ends current financing and any device promotion or deposit reimbursement credits and we will pay the remaining balance of your then-existing finance agreement; trade-in satisfies early upgrade and not valued separately. Not combinable with some offers (e.g. JUMP). Upgrade benefit is subject to cancellation or change. **Tethering:** 250GB high-speed data then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. For customers using >50GB/mo., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone and tablet usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot Service (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphones and tablets. **AutoPay Pricing** for voice lines 1-8. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $5 more/line/mo. May not be reflected on first bill. **Int’l Roaming:** Calls, including over Wi-Fi, are $.25/min. in 215+ countries and destinations (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico, and Canada). In Canada/Mexico, up to 30GB high-speed data then unlimited at up to 256kbps. In 215+ countries and destinations, up to 15GB high-speed data, then unlimited at up to 256 Kbps. Video typically streams at up to 2.5 Mbps (SD), where available. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our network. Device must register on our network before international use. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. **Apple TV:** Offer subject to change. We'll reimburse your previous internet service provider's early termination fees when you join T-Mobile Home Internet or Small Business Internet—up to $750 via virtual prepaid card to you.

**Requires 60 days service before validation.**

**Step 1:** Sign up for a qualifying internet plan.

**Step 2:** Cancel your old internet service.

**Step 3:** Pay your old Internet Service Provider's (ISP's) final bill.

**Step 4:** Prepare your reimbursement request within 60 days of activation of your T-Mobile internet service. (Activation occurs either at time of purchase or when the gateway is shipped to you).

You'll need to submit a screen shot or photo of your final bill showing the early termination fee (ETF). Contract Freedom covers contract-related ETFs. It does not cover other fees, such as: Construction costs, equipment or device costs, device non-return or damage fees, late fees, missed payments, delinquent accounts/charge-offs. The name or address on the bill must match your T-Mobile Account billing information. ## Get a Month On Us, plus up to $300 back.

**Month On Us:** with one-time bill credit equal to monthly rate plus fees after AutoPay and other applicable discounts. Limited-time; subject to change. Qualifying new Internet line required. Enter promotional code at checkout. Not transferrable. Allow 2 bill cycles for credit. Limit 2/account. May not be combined with some offers or discounts. **Money Back:** Limited-time; subject to change. Register code within 30 days of activating qualifying new Internet line ( **$100**: Rely; **$200**: Amplified; **$300**: All-In). If you have cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Up to $300 via virtual prepaid Mastercard; use online or in-store via accepted mobile payment apps; **no cash access & expires in 6 months**. The Virtual Prepaid Mastercard is issued by Sunrise Banks N.A., Member FDIC, pursuant to a license from Mastercard International Incorporated. Mastercard is a registered trademark, and the circles design is a trademark of Mastercard International Incorporated. This card may be used everywhere Debit Mastercard is accepted. Registration, activation, acceptance, or use of this card constitutes acceptance of the terms and conditions stated in the Prepaid Card Agreement. This promotion is not associated, sponsored, or endorsed by Mastercard or Sunrise Banks N.A. Lines must be active and in good standing when card is issued. Max 1/account. May not be combined with some offers, discounts, or promotions.

## Save your family up to $1000/yr when you bundle.

**Full Terms**

**Savings:**

​Limited-time; subject to change. Savings based on 3rd line free via monthly bill credits, internet discount with $15 in monthly bill credits, and AutoPay discount. Qualifying credit required. Credits may take up to 2 bill cycles; **credits will stop if you cancel any lines or change plans.** AutoPay pricing requires bank acct. or debit card, otherwise $5 more/mo./line. May not be combined with any other discounts, promotions, or offers.

**5 Year Price Guarantee Experience Plans:**

5 year guarantee means we won’t change the price of talk, text, and 5G smartphone data on our network for at least 5 years as long as you are on an Experience plan. Guarantee also applies to price for data on wearable/tablet/mobile internet lines added to your plan. Your guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn’t restart if you add a line or change plans after that. Taxes & fees, per-use charges, plan add-ons, third-party services, and network management practices aren’t included.

**5 Year Price Guarantee All-In Internet Plan:**

5-year price guarantee means that we won't change the price of fixed-wireless 5G internet data for at least 5 years while you are on an eligible plan. Taxes & fees, voluntary equipment or speed upgrades, future wireless generations, select limited-time promotions, per-use charges, third-party services, and network management practices aren't included. This guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn't restart if you add a line or change plans after that.

**Experience Beyond Plan:**

Limited time; subject to change. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $4.49 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Credit approval & deposit may be required. U.S. roaming and on-network data allotments differ: includes 200MB roaming. Unlimited talk & text features for direct communications between 2 people; others (e.g., conference & chat lines, etc.) may cost extra. Unlimited high-speed data in US only. Not available for hotspots and some other data-first devices. Capable device required for some features. Activation required to deliver video streams at speeds that provide up to Ultra HD video capability (max 4K); some content providers may not stream their services in UHD. May affect speed of video downloads; does not apply to video uploads. **Upgrade-ready Every Year:** Available only for qualifying new financed devices purchased on Experience Beyond plan; existing devices are not eligible. Upgrade qualifying device after at least 6 months and when 50% of device cost has been paid. Trade-in device must be in good working order. You must be current with your scheduled financing and wireless service payments. Upgrading ends current financing and any device promotion or deposit reimbursement credits and we will pay the remaining balance of your then-existing finance agreement; trade-in satisfies early upgrade and not valued separately. Not combinable with some offers (e.g. JUMP). Upgrade benefit is subject to cancellation or change. **Tethering:** 250GB high-speed data then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. For customers using >50GB/mo., primary data usage must be on smartphone or tablet. Smartphone and tablet usage is prioritized over Mobile Hotspot Service (tethering) usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on smartphones and tablets. **AutoPay Pricing** for voice lines 1-8. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $5 more/line/mo. May not be reflected on first bill. **Int’l Roaming:** Calls, including over Wi-Fi, are $.25/min. in 215+ countries and destinations (no charge for Wi-Fi calls to US, Mexico, and Canada). In Canada/Mexico, up to 30GB high-speed data then unlimited at up to 256kbps. In 215+ countries and destinations, up to 15GB high-speed data, then unlimited at up to 256 Kbps. Video typically streams at up to 2.5 Mbps (SD), where available. Not for extended international use; you must reside in the U.S. and primary usage must occur on our network. Device must register on our network before international use. Service may be terminated or restricted for excessive roaming. **Apple TV:** Offer subject to change. Receive Apple TV (up to $9.99/mo. value) while you maintain 1 qualifying Experience Beyond line in good standing. Valid only for Apple TV in the United States. Complete registration with Apple in the Apple TV app; requires iTunes/Apple Media Services account. Terms and Apple Privacy Policy apply; see the applicable terms at [https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/us/terms.html](https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.apple.com%2Flegal%2Finternet-services%2Fitunes%2Fus%2Fterms.html&data=05%7C01%7CJustin.Samuels%40t-mobile.com%7C030adfe5f3314357c12008db94fdd60a%7Cbe0f980bdd994b19bd7bbc71a09b026c%7C0%7C0%7C638267590166880964%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C3000%7C%7C%7C&sdata=Yy1ZRkWbyVgXyULPJbWSYzOk4k%2Fwc1IOpOwqlZHB3wg%3D&reserved=0). Must be 13+. Only one offer per account; may take 1-2 bill cycles. Apple TV is a registered trademark of Apple Inc. Apple is not a sponsor of this promotion. **Netflix:** Offer subject to change. Receive Netflix Standard with ads while you maintain 1 qualifying Experience Beyond line in good standing. Netflix account, plan availability & compatible device required. Alternative discount toward different Netflix streaming plans may apply. Not redeemable or refundable for cash; cannot be exchanged for Netflix gift subscriptions. Cancel Netflix anytime. Netflix Terms of Use apply: [www.netflix.com/termsofuse](http://www.netflix.com/termsofuse). 1 offer per T-Mobile account; for existing Netflix members it may take 1-2 bill cycles during which time you will continue to be charged separately for any existing Netflix account. If you link an existing Netflix account to this offer, terminating the qualifying line(s) will not automatically cancel your Netflix membership, and Netflix will automatically resume charging your existing payment method that they have on file. Hulu: Hulu (With Ads) while you maintain a qualifying Experience Beyond line in good standing. Offer subject to change. One Hulu offer per eligible T-Mobile account. Offer available to new and returning Hulu subscribers only. Use of the Hulu service is subject to the Hulu Subscriber Agreement. Access to complimentary Hulu (With Ads) subscription begins upon Hulu account activation. Any Hulu plan switch after redemption of this offer will result in offer forfeiture. Like all plans, features may change or be discontinued at any time; see T-Mobile Terms and Conditions at T-Mobile.com for details. **Coverage** not available in some areas; we are not responsible for our partners’ networks. **Scam Shield:** Capable device req’d. Turning on Scam Block might block calls you want; disable any time. **In-Flight Connection:** On select flights on select U.S.-based airlines; Wi-Fi Calling functionality, valid e911 address, & 1 prior Wi-Fi call w/ current SIM card req'd for messaging. Streaming where available. **T-Satellite Service:** Compatible device required. Satellite service, including 911, may be delayed, limited, or unavailable. Developing technology available in most areas, most of the time; ultimately available in most outdoor areas where you can see the sky. Coverage not available in some areas. **Network Management:** Service may be slowed, suspended, terminated, or restricted for misuse, abnormal use, interference with our network or ability to provide quality service to other users, or significant roaming. On-device usage is prioritized over tethering usage, which may result in higher speeds for data used on device. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for details. **See Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision)** at www.T-Mobile.com for additional information. T-Mobile, the T logo, Magenta and the magenta color are registered trademarks of Deutsche Telekom AG. © 2025 T-Mobile USA, Inc.

**All-In Home Internet:**

**During congestion, customers on this plan may notice speeds lower than other customers and further reduction if using >1.2TB/mo., due to data prioritization.** Not available in all areas. $35 device connection charge due at sale. Plus taxes & fees for accounts currently paying for a T-Mobile wireless line with additional taxes & fees: Monthly Regulatory Programs & Telco Recovery Fees totaling up to $1.60 per line, and federal and local surcharges apply. See Broadband Facts at T-Mobile.com. Credit approval required. For use only with select T-Mobile Gateways for in-home use at location provided at activation; service restricted away from approved address. Return each device undamaged or pay up to $370. **The Gateway** shown is for illustration only. The actual Gateway you receive may vary. **Video** streaming resolution depends on available speeds. For best performance, leave video streaming applications at their default resolution setting. Not compatible with some live TV streaming services. **AutoPay Pricing** for lines 1-8 on account. AutoPay discount requires bank account or debit card, otherwise $5 more/line/mo. May not be reflected on first bill. **Tech Support** provided by Assurant® Personal TechPro. Terms and conditions apply. **Hulu:** Offer subject to change. Receive Hulu (With Ads) while you maintain a qualifying All-In Internet line in good standing. One Hulu offer per eligible T-Mobile Internet line. Max 2 redemptions per eligible T-Mobile account; requires eligible e-mail address per redemption. Offer available to new and returning Hulu subscribers only. Use of the Hulu service is subject to the Hulu Subscriber Agreement. Any Hulu plan switch after redemption of this offer will result in offer forfeiture. **Paramount+:** As a T-Mobile All-In Home Internet customer in good standing, get Paramount+ on us when you subscribe to a Paramount+ Essential Monthly Plan as a new or former Paramount+ subscriber. One claim per eligible line and max of two per account. Open to residents in the 50 United States. Cancel any time, effective at end of billing period. 18+. Your subscription to Paramount+ will be subject to the Paramount+ Subscription Terms ( [https://pplus.legal/subscription](https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https://pplus.legal/subscription&data=05%7c02%7cCharles.Baxter5%40t-mobile.com%7c3e12293e19b34dfb367908dcf9493b42%7cbe0f980bdd994b19bd7bbc71a09b026c%7c0%7c0%7c638659340144702203%7cUnknown%7cTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7c0%7c%7c%7c&sdata=Ud2%2BNsPFH8easlYtgcTZlhP/I/QgRw/yGGmaxmGLqDY%3D&reserved=0)) and the Paramount Global Privacy Policy ( [https://pplus.legal/privacy](https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https://pplus.legal/privacy&data=05%7c02%7cCharles.Baxter5%40t-mobile.com%7c3e12293e19b34dfb367908dcf9493b42%7cbe0f980bdd994b19bd7bbc71a09b026c%7c0%7c0%7c638659340144718632%7cUnknown%7cTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7c0%7c%7c%7c&sdata=ct0CdmJka9%2BzY151XHAA6qPitEeNvK16fvPbaJskTGU%3D&reserved=0)). Like all plans, features may change or be discontinued at any time; see T-Mobile Terms and Conditions for details. **Network Management:** Service may be slowed, suspended, terminated, or restricted for misuse, abnormal use, interference with our network or ability to provide quality service to other users. See T-Mobile.com/OpenInternet for details. **See Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision)** at [www.T-Mobile.com](http://www.t-mobile.com/) for additional information. **5-Year price Guarantee** means that we won't change the price of fixed-wireless 5G internet data for at least 5 years while you are on an eligible plan. Taxes & fees, voluntary equipment or speed upgrades, future wireless generations, select limited-time promotions, per-use charges, third-party services, and network management practices aren't included. This guarantee starts when you activate or switch to an eligible plan and doesn't restart if you add a line or change plans after that.

## Save on your internet when you bundle.

With $20 in monthly bill credits. Limited-time; subject to change. Qualifying credit, postpaid 55+ voice line (Min. age 55), and new Internet line required. If you have cancelled Internet lines in past 90 days, you may need to reactivate them first. Credits may take up to 2 bill cycles; **credits will stop if you cancel any lines or change plans.** Limit 1/account. May not be combined with some offers or discounts.

## Home phone service with Ooma.

Limited time; subject to change. Qualifying Home Internet service required. Max 1/account. May not be combinable with other offers. Offer fulfilled by Ooma. Suggested retail price of $129.99. Activation of monthly service that includes Ooma Premier features for $9.99 per month plus applicable taxes and fees is required within 60 days of receipt of the Ooma Telo Air. **If you do not activate your subscription within 60 days, or if you activate and subsequently cancel your Ooma service within 18 months of activation, you must, at your own expense, return the Ooma Telo Air device to Ooma in original condition, together with all parts and accessories, or pay $129.99.** You authorize Ooma to collect any payment owed by you hereunder from your payment method, as provided in Ooma's Terms and Conditions. See [https://www.ooma.com/legal/terms/](https://www.ooma.com/legal/terms/).

Ooma's phone service does not include high-speed Internet or Broadband Service. Federal universal service charges, FCC regulatory fees, state and local taxes, fees and surcharges, and regulatory and compliance fees are billed monthly and subject to change. To determine the specific charges in your area, go to [http://www.ooma.com/rates](http://www.ooma.com/rates).

Unlimited U.S. calls are subject to normal usage limitations. See [https://www.ooma.com/legal/terms/](https://www.ooma.com/legal/terms/) for current usage limitations. International calls are billed per minute. Directory assistance (411) calls are billed per call. See [http://www.ooma.com/rates](http://www.ooma.com/rates). Ooma E911 service operates differently from non-Internet 911 service. See [http://www.ooma.com/911](http://www.ooma.com/911) for details. Some alarms, faxes and other devices may not be compatible. Additional terms apply; see [https://www.ooma.com/legal/terms/](https://www.ooma.com/legal/terms/).

## New York residents may qualify for our $15/month Home Internet plan.

## HULU On Us for Internet.

Offer subject to change. Receive Hulu (With Ads) while you maintain a qualifying All-In Internet line in good standing. One Hulu offer per eligible T-Mobile Internet line. Max 2 redemptions per eligible T-Mobile account; requires eligible e-mail address per redemption. Offer available to new and returning Hulu subscribers only. Use of the Hulu service is subject to the Hulu Subscriber Agreement. Any Hulu plan switch after redemption of this offer will result in offer forfeiture. Like all plans, features may change or be discontinued at any time; see T-Mobile Terms and Conditions at [T-Mobile.com](https://www.t-mobile.com/) for details.

## Paramount+ Essential Plan for Internet On Us.

As a T-Mobile All-In Home Internet customer in good standing, get Paramount+ on us when you subscribe to a Paramount+ Essential monthly plan as a new or former Paramount+ subscriber. One claim per eligible line and max of two per account. Open to residents in the 50 United States. Cancel any time, effective at end of billing period. 18+. Your subscription to Paramount+ will be subject to the Paramount+ Subscription Terms ( [https://pplus.legal/subscription](https://legal.paramount.com/us/en/pplus/termsofuse)) and the Paramount Global Privacy Policy ( [https://pplus.legal/privacy](https://www.viacomcbsprivacy.com/en/policy)). Like all plans, features may change or be discontinued at any time; see T-Mobile Terms and Conditions for details.

## 24/7 live assistance with video support.

**Technical Support** through Assurant® Personal TechPro is provided by The Signal, an Assurant company. Terms and Conditions apply.

web.markdown:

Find out now! [View Plans for T-Mobile Home Internet](https://go.highspeedinternet.com/aff_c?aff_id=1002&aff_sub=google&aff_sub2=organic&cl_system=mapi&offer_id=1910&source=https://www.highspeedinternet.com/providers/t-mobile-home-internet) ![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2025/01/budget-icon-blue.svg)Best Value Rely Home Internet $50/mo.\*w/ AutoPay, plus taxes & fees Speeds up to 318Mbps [View Plan for T-Mobile Home Internet](https://go.highspeedinternet.com/aff_c?aff_id=1002&aff_sub=google&aff_sub2=organic&cl_system=mapi&offer_id=1910&source=https://www.highspeedinternet.com/providers/t-mobile-home-internet) ![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2025/01/badge-icon-white.svg)Best for Everything All-In Home Internet $70/mo.\* w/ AutoPay, plus taxes & fees Speeds up to 498Mbps [View Plan for T-Mobile Home Internet](https://go.highspeedinternet.com/aff_c?aff_id=1002&aff_sub=google&aff_sub2=organic&cl_system=mapi&offer_id=1910&source=https://www.highspeedinternet.com/providers/t-mobile-home-internet) See [disclaimers](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/providers/t-mobile-home-internet#plans-disclaimers) ## ![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2024/12/logo_bird-primary-32x32-1.svg)T-Mobile 5G home internet review T-Mobile 5G Home Internet is an excellent alternative to cable or even fiber internet. It’s got capable speeds, a super breezy onboarding process, and even comes with a free internet gateway rental, all for an incredibly affordable price per month. [Want to learn more? Read our full review.](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/providers/t-mobile-home-internet/internet)![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2025/02/carat-right-blue.svg) ![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2025/01/internet-analysis-man.svg) Pros ![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2025/01/icon_pros-24px.svg)Cheap flat fees ![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2025/01/icon_pros-24px.svg)Easy installation ![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2025/01/icon_pros-24px.svg)Wi-Fi 7 Gateway (Amplified and All-In) Cons ![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2025/01/icon_cons-24px.svg)Limited availability ![](https://www.highspeedinternet.com/app/uploads/2025/01/icon_cons-24px.svg)Inconsistent connection reliability ### All T-Mobile 5G Home Internet plans and pricing | Plan | Price | Download speed | | --- | --- | --- | | **Rely Home Internet** | $50/mo.†
w/ AutoPay, plus taxes & fees. | Up to 318Mbps | | **Amplified Home Internet** | $60/mo.\*
w/ AutoPay, plus taxes & fees. | Up to 498Mbps | | **All-In Home Internet** | $70/mo.\*

Though the speed is variable, it’s far more than I need for running HD/4K on a couple of devices and working from home. The service has been the most reliable of any service that I’ve ever had.
